description:
Bootstrap epic produced by /spec-led-bootstrap (full-adopt + migrate path).

Target phase: phase2
Subjects in scope: 9 (status: draft -> active, then realized_by.api_boundary)
Worktree: /Users/mz/dev/mz/mutagen_ex-bootstrap
Branch: spec-led/bootstrap
Dep: {:spec_led_ex, github: "iautom8things/specled_ex", branch: "main", only: [:dev, :test], runtime: false}
Phase0 scaffolding committed: feb5675

Context: the .spec/ corpus was hand-authored as a tooling-optional convention
(documented in the original .spec/AGENTS.md). This epic reverses that stance
(see .spec/decisions/adopt_specled_tooling.md) and migrates the corpus to the
SpecLedEx schema, then binds each subject to code via realized_by.api_boundary.

Migration surface (mix spec.validate on the original corpus): errors=67 warnings=273
  - 9x parse_error    : spec-scenarios needs given/when/then arrays
  - 58x verification_*: spec-verification needs command:/target:
  - 267x scenario_*   : resolve once scenario blocks reshaped
  - 6x requirement_without_verification
The 18 decision files already match SpecLedEx schema and are NOT migrated.

Opt-outs: implementation/expanded_behavior/use/typespecs tiers OFF (api_boundary only);
coverage triangulation (spec.cover.test) OFF (phase4 follow-on); test-tag scanner (phase3) OFF.
Reference: docs/adoption.md in the spec_led_ex repo.

comments.text:
ORCHESTRATED
Children closed: 11 this run (phase1 umbrella .2; nine subject migrations .2.1–.2.9; phase2 bindings .3). phase0 .1 was already closed.
BOUNCEs encountered: 1 (.2.8 verify FAIL — v2 verification pointed at a nonexistent `--only no_module_load` tag and ran zero tests; bounced to implementer, fixed by retargeting v2 to the full-file run; re-verified PASS).
User escalations: 0 hard pauses. 2 user decisions requested: (a) implementer mode → Claude subagents; (b) pre-existing mix.exs format violation → fixed inline (commit 083cdf0).

Result: .spec/ corpus fully migrated to the SpecLedEx schema and all 9 subjects bound via realized_by.api_boundary.
Epic branch spec-led/bootstrap @ cdfad67 (19 commits over base feb5675). Final gates GREEN:
  mix compile --warnings-as-errors · mix test --seed 0 (640/0) · mix format --check-formatted · mix deps.unlock --check-unused
  mix spec.validate → status=pass errors=0 warnings=0 · mix spec.check branch_guard_dangling_binding → 0

Follow-ups surfaced (NOT done — out of this epic's scope):
- telemetry.app not bundled in the .ez archive → archive_install_test red (pre-existing; r16/mutagen.cli v11). File as a standalone bug.
- coverage_runner_test order-dependent tmp-leak flake under random seed (pre-existing; use --seed 0).
- .spec/state.json: committed form is `mix spec.index` output; `mix spec.validate` writes a divergent verbose form. Decide which generator is canonical / whether to gitignore before CI asserts a clean tree.

Epic left in_progress (phase:implementing) per lifecycle — orchestration finishes the CODE only. Next: a single human-reviewed PR from spec-led/bootstrap → main (do not auto-open).

title: Adopt SpecLedEx to phase2 (migrate bespoke .spec corpus)
